title: The Legend of Zelda Title Theme - Mario Paint Composer
description:
100,000 views May 31 2010

I've re-done this twice in total and have been working on it for a long time and It's finally ready for Youtubers' eyes. I integrated a new trick I inventede which can make car sounds separated (or stacatto) by turning down the volume of a car sound on the very next beat. I hope you like it. (I admit though it's not as fancy as some of my others but the original song was simple as well so... what can you do :/ )

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
